message:
fix(widgets): garbage-collect orphaned widgets and fix nested hover hit-testing

The widget system leaked memory when set_root was called: old root and
all descendants remained in the render map. Additionally, hovered_widget
used incorrect coordinate math, adding parent offsets instead of
accumulating origin offsets, causing wrong hit-testing in nested layouts.

Changes:
- Add BFS-based reachable_widgets() and retain_reachable() to Graph
- Implement garbage_collect_unreachable_widgets() running after every
  render pass, pruning render map, children/parent maps, and resetting
  focus to root if focused widget was collected
- Add GC telemetry fields (state_entries_count, gc_cycles, gc_freed)
  to RenderTelemetry for observability
- Fix set_root to immediately update self.graph.root and self.focused
- Rewrite hovered_widget/hovered_recursive with proper coordinate
  accumulation (subtract parent position from screen coords)
- Change best from (usize, WidgetId) to Option<...> so clicks outside
  all widgets return None
- 4 new tests: nested_hover_delivers_mouse_to_deepest_child,
  hover_outside_root_is_ignored, set_root_updates_focus_immediately,
  render_garbage_collects_unreachable_widget_ids
- Add MouseRecorder test widget and fixed_constraints() helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
